sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FTC order directing Intuit to stop deceptive TurboTax ads thrown out by US court
feed.summary: A U.S. appeals court has invalidated an FTC order that barred TurboTax maker Intuit from advertising its software as "free" when not all taxpayers were eligible. The 5th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that the FTC violated the constitutional separation of powers by having an administrative law judge decide deceptive advertising claims. The matter has been returned to the FTC for further proceedings, with Intuit maintaining its advertising has always been clear and transparent.

feed.title: GAMMA Investing LLC Raises Holdings in Eli Lilly and Company

feed.title: Microchip Launches BZPACK mSiC® Power Modules for High-Reliability Applications in Harsh Environments
feed.summary: Microchip Technology Inc. has introduced its new BZPACK mSiC® power modules, engineered for high reliability and performance in demanding power conversion environments, particularly for industrial and renewable energy applications. These modules surpass standard HV-H3TRB testing requirements, offer robust insulation, and come in various configurations for design flexibility. Their compact, baseplate-less design with press-fit, solderless terminals and optional pre-applied Thermal Interface Material simplifies manufacturing and integration.

feed.title: Plainfield rejects zoning for Costco Wholesale distribution center straddling Canterbury town line
feed.summary: Plainfield town officials have denied an application for a Costco distribution hub that would span the Plainfield and Canterbury town line, with all truck traffic routed through Plainfield. Despite the Planning and Zoning Commission approving a related zoning text amendment, concerns about increased truck traffic and its impact on residential areas led to the rejection of the zone change application. The proposed facility included two 1.1 million-square-foot buildings and was projected to generate 4,084 daily trips, with 2,844 from trucks.

feed.title: How Marzetti’s Simply Dressed Launch and Bachan’s Deal Financing Will Impact Marzetti (MZTI) Investors
feed.summary: The Marzetti Company recently launched its Simply Dressed salad dressings line and amended its credit agreement to fund the acquisition of Bachan's Inc., a Japanese Barbecue Sauce brand. These strategic moves aim to refresh core brands, extend the sauces portfolio, and reach new consumers, impacting Marzetti's (MZTI) investment narrative around product innovation and margins. Investors are evaluating whether these actions can justify the current premium valuation amidst potential retailer consolidation and modest growth expectations.

feed.title: How AIG’s Agentic AI Specialty Underwriting Partnership with McGill and Partners Has Changed Its Investment Story (AIG)
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) has partnered with McGill and Partners to utilize agentic AI and real-time data for specialty underwriting, aiming to manage insurance capacity more efficiently. This collaboration reinforces AIG's data-driven strategy and technological investments but is viewed as an incremental change rather than a transformative one for its near-term results and risk profile. Investors should consider the operational and technology execution risks associated with this AI push, alongside the planned CEO transition, as these factors will influence future profitability and AIG's ability to execute complex programs.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Inc stock faces Citigroup price target cut amid oil shock and mixed earnings outlook
feed.summary: Citigroup has cut its price target for Delta Air Lines (DAL) to $77 from $87, maintaining a Buy rating, due to rising jet fuel costs from the Iran conflict adding an estimated $400 million to Q1 expenses. Despite a mixed earnings report for Q4 2025, Delta achieved record free cash flow, and its refinery ownership provides a hedge against fuel price volatility. The stock faces market pressures and investor sentiment is mixed, but its strategic focus on premium travel and strong financials appeal to DACH investors seeking diversified aviation plays.

feed.title: Iran War Threatens AI Chip Supply as Critical Minerals at Risk
feed.summary: The ongoing Iran War poses a significant threat to the global AI chip supply due to potential disruptions in critical mineral supply chains from the Middle East. Key minerals like helium, aluminum, and bromine, essential for semiconductor production, are largely sourced from the region. The conflict could severely impact major tech companies and the burgeoning AI industry if disruptions are prolonged, despite some chipmakers having short-term stockpiles.

feed.title: Eversource Energy Offshore Wind Projects Encounter Mounting Headwinds in New England
feed.summary: Eversource Energy's offshore wind projects in the US Northeast, including Vineyard Wind 1 and South Fork Wind, are facing significant challenges due to escalating costs, supply chain disruptions, and regulatory hurdles. These issues have led to project delays and financial strain, prompting the company to reevaluate its strategies even as it pivots towards transmission upgrades. Despite these headwinds, Eversource remains a defensive utility with a 4.5% dividend yield, appealing to income-focused investors, with analysts expecting EPS growth to $4.87 in 2026.
